understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate each level's grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+'), while avoiding spike hazards and making efficient use of available moves and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to horizontal (left/right), after which gravity would automatically pull the player in the current gravity direction until landing on a support, spike, or goal. CLICK actions allowed the removal of breakable ('x') tiles to open up new fall paths, and UNDO could revert the previous action. Hazards like spikes ('u', 'v') would instantly end the attempt if landed upon.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate each level's grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+'), while avoiding spike hazards and making efficient use of available moves and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to horizontal (left/right), after which gravity would automatically pull the player in the current gravity direction until landing on a support, spike, or goal. CLICK actions allowed the removal of breakable ('x') tiles to open up new fall paths, and UNDO could revert the previous action. Hazards like spikes ('u', 'v') would instantly end the attempt if landed upon.
